citation_short: HRW, The Massalit Will Not Come Home (2024)
title: “The Massalit Will Not Come Home”: Ethnic Cleansing and Crimes Against Humanity in El Geneina, West Darfur, Sudan
geographic_scope: El Geneina and Ardamata, West Darfur; Chad refugee sites
strengths: Deep field investigation with many interviews, satellite and media verification, and detailed local chronology.
limitations: Some counts are lower bounds or status-mixed; several clinic totals are acknowledged as causally ambiguous or potentially duplicative.
notes: Core source for the full estimate.

citation_short: Reuters, rolling ethnic massacre in Sudan (2023)
title: How Arab fighters carried out a rolling ethnic massacre in Sudan
geographic_scope: El Geneina, West Darfur; Chad refugee sites
strengths: Strong witness base, cemetery/satellite analysis, and transparent distinction between named dead and broader field estimate.
limitations: Not a status-coded victim registry; some numbers are source-estimated rather than fully enumerated.
notes: Key source for lower bounds and a field-medic best estimate.

title: Report of the OHCHR monitoring mission to Chad on the human rights situation of Sudanese refugees from West Darfur
author_or_org: Office of the High Commissioner for Human Rights
geographic_scope: El Geneina to Adré corridor; West Darfur/Chad border
strengths: Near-contemporaneous mission focused on newly arrived refugees; strong for the June exodus corridor.
limitations: Mission timing captures terminal massacre week better than earlier April-May urban killings.
notes: Critical for ending the full estimate on 2023-06-22 and for not collapsing the corridor into a city-only denominator.

title: A/HRC/57/CRP.6: Findings of the investigations conducted by the Independent International Fact-Finding Mission for the Sudan
author_or_org: Independent International Fact-Finding Mission for the Sudan / OHCHR
geographic_scope: Sudan nationwide; relevant El Geneina/Ardamata section
strengths: Authoritative legal-factual framing of ethnic targeting and the sequence from El Geneina to Ardamata.
limitations: Useful more for classification and periodization than for precise sub-episode counts.
notes: Supports the split between the April-June El Geneina window and the November Ardamata window.

citation_short: UN Panel of Experts on Sudan S/2024/65
title: Final report of the Panel of Experts on the Sudan
author_or_org: United Nations Security Council Panel of Experts on the Sudan
pages_or_sections: summary; case study 1 on El Geneina and Ardamatta
strengths: Important high-level benchmark for 2023 El Geneina killings and for linking El Geneina with Ardamata as a broader cleansing cycle.
limitations: Not detailed enough by itself for a publishable sub-episode denominator model.
notes: Used for family framing and for bounding the broader 2023 cycle, not as the sole input to the April-June estimate.

title: Sudan: West Darfur conflict
strengths: Helpful for state-level displacement and the wider West Darfur crisis context.
limitations: Geography is too broad for the El Geneina core denominator and should not be substituted for the local episode footprint.
notes: Useful contextual source, but not a direct denominator source for the full estimate.

citation_short: Reuters, second wave of ethnic purge (2023)
title: Sudan refugees detail second wave of bloody ethnic purge by Arab forces
geographic_scope: Ardamata / El Geneina, West Darfur; Chad border
strengths: Strong witness detail on the November episode, including garrison flight and mass civilian targeting.
limitations: Civilian denominator after the June exodus remains poorly bounded.
notes: Used to justify keeping Ardamata as a separate, not-yet-publishable episode.

title: Bearing Witness: Atrocities and Looming Hunger in Darfur
pages_or_sections: main text discussing El Geneina and Ardamata
strengths: Good corroboration for November Ardamata civilian death ranges.
limitations: Not a denominator source; mainly contextual for the split episode map.
notes: Used for the non-estimated Ardamata window.

title: South Sudan: Resumption of civil war
strengths: Compact overview of the 1983-2005 war and broad casualty/displacement scale.
limitations: Too aggregated for denominator-consistent DR estimation.

title: 2005 Sudanese Comprehensive Peace Agreement
strengths: Primary source for the 2005 endpoint of the Second Sudanese Civil War.
notes: Used to anchor the terminal split of the SSCW sequence.

title: Sudan: Conflict in Darfur
strengths: Compact overview of Darfur conflict onset and Janjaweed/government response.

title: Scorched Earth, Poisoned Air: Sudanese Government Forces Ravage Jebel Marra, Darfur
strengths: Strong source for the 2016 Jebel Marra campaign as a distinct residual-Darfur phase.
